content: Remote OK Software engineer Sticker Mule <div class="_descriptionText_135ul_202"><p>Sticker Mule is building the Internet's most lucrative commerce platform by combining software, manufacturing, and AI into one fully integrated stack. No print company, or pure software company for that matter, can match what we're doing. We're privately owned, profitable, and doing 9-figures in annual revenue with no meddlesome investors.</p><p><br /></p><h2><strong>How we work</strong></h2><ol><li><p>Small, autonomous teams that own products end-to-end.</p></li><li><p>Prioritize what matters right now and pivot instantly when needed.</p></li><li><p>Ship across web and mobile from the same codebase. We use Go, TypeScript, React, Expo, GraphQL, Postgres, and run on GCP.</p></li><li><p>Use AI aggressively to push the limit of what we can do.</p></li><li><p>Move fast, build for the masses, and deprioritize edge cases.</p></li><li><p>Fully remote from 40+ countries and collaborate using Asana and Slack.</p></li></ol><div><br /></div><h2><strong>Requirements</strong></h2><ol><li><p>You are an exceptional full-stack software engineer.</p></li><li><p>You use AI aggressively and write well in English.</p><p><br /></p></li></ol><h2><strong>What you will work on</strong></h2><p>You'll help build and scaleÂ <strong>Sticker Mule</strong>Â <strong>Pro</strong>Â â a suite of software tools for creators and businesses:</p><ol><li><p>Stores (Shopify alternative)</p></li><li><p>AI tools (internal and customer-facing)</p></li><li><p>Notify (Mailchimp alternative)</p></li><li><p>Reply (Zendesk alternative)</p></li><li><p>Hire Me (Contra alternative)</p></li><li><p>Mobile apps</p></li></ol><div><br /></div><h2><strong>Compensation</strong></h2><ol><li><p>Salary: $150,000â$250,000 USD</p></li><li><p>$20,000 signing bonus</p></li><li><p>4 weeks vacation + country-specific holidays</p></li><li><p>Fully remote</p></li></ol></div> engineer, golang, docker 2026-05-14T15:44:31+00:00 1131592 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-software-engineer-sticker-mule-1131592 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png IT Support Technician Avalere Health <p><b><span style="font-size: 16px">About Avalere Health</span></b></p><p><br></p><p>United by one profound purpose: to reach <b>EVERY PATIENT POSSIBLE</b>. At Avalere Health, we ensure every patient is identified, treated, supported, and cared for. Equally. Our Advisory, Medical, and Marketing teams come together â powerfully and intentionally â to forge unconventional connections, building a future where healthcare is not a barrier and no patient is left behind.<span style="font-size: 16px">&nbsp;</span></p><p><br></p><p><span style="font-size: 16px">Achieving our mission starts with providing enriching, purpose-driven careers for our team that empower them to make a tangible impact on patient lives. We are committed to creating a culture where our employees are empowered to bring their whole selves to work and tap into the power of diverse backgrounds and skillsets to play a part in making a difference for every patient, everywhere.&nbsp;</span></p><p><br></p><p><span style="font-size: 16px">Our flexible approach to working allows our global teams to decide where they want to work, whether in-office or at home based on team and client need. Major city hubs in London, Manchester, Washington, D.C., and New York, and smaller offices globally, serve as collaboration hubs allowing our teams to come together when it matters. Homeworkers are equally supported, with dedicated social opportunities and resources.&nbsp;&nbsp;</span></p><p><br></p><p><span style="font-size: 16px">Our inclusive culture is at the heart of everything we do. We proudly support our employees in bringing their whole selves to work with our six Employee Network Groups â Diverse Ability, Family, Gender, LGBTQ+, Mental Health, and Race/Ethnicity. These groups provide opportunities to promote diversity, equity, and inclusion and to connect, learn, and socialise through regular meetings and programs of activity.&nbsp;We are an accredited Fertility Friendly employer with our Fertility Policy, enhanced parental leave, and culture of flexibility ensuring every employee feels supported across their family planning journey and can work in a way that suits their familyâs needs.&nbsp;</span></p><p><br></p><p><span style="font-size: 16px">We are deeply invested in supporting professional growth for our employees through day-to-day career experiences, access to thousands of on-demand training sessions, regular career conversations, and the opportunity for global, cross-capability career moves. &nbsp;</span></p><p><br></p><p><span style="font-size: 16px">We take pride in being part of the Disability Confident Scheme. This helps make sure you can be interviewed fairly if you have a disability, long term health condition, or are neurodiverse. If you'd like to apply and need adjustments made, you can let us know in your application.</span></p><p><br></p><p><strong>About the Role (On-site Washington D.C. and surrounding suburbs)</strong></p><p>&nbsp;</p><p><span style="font-size: 12pt;">The IT Support Technician will provide onsite and remote technical support to Avalere Health employees. The qualified candidate possesses a strong desire to provide excellent customer service and will demonstrate an eagerness to learn and thrive in an evolving technical landscape. The role will be primarily employee technical support, focusing on managing the employeeâs expectation during the diagnosis, troubleshooting, and resolution of their technical issues.</span></p><p>&nbsp;</p><p><span style="font-size: 12pt;">This person must be able to work in an ever-changing environment and must have a positive, can-do attitude. The support technician must be detail-oriented and a proactive communicator who is motivated to take the lead on solving problems.</span></p>\n<p></p><p><br></p><b>What You'll Do</b><ul><li>Daily monitoring of assigned tickets and the incident management ticket queue</li><li>Ownership of assigned tickets during the incident life cycle providing timely and informed responses to ticket creators</li><li>Accurate recording of applied time against tickets</li><li>Procurement, provisioning, and support of IT hardware including laptops, printers, and mobile devices</li><li>Procurement, provisioning, and support of IT software and services</li><li>Implement file and/or folder permissions changes</li><li>End-User web filtering and email security support</li><li>Engage and coordinate with hardwa
